_info.title: LitBridge API
_info.description: Federated biomedical literature search with AI enrichment and conversational follow-up.

SourceType.description: External database sources for federated search.

OAStatus.description: Open-access availability status for a publication.

QueryType.description: How the query string should be interpreted.

SearchMode.description: Search depth and AI analysis mode.

quick.description: Fast search, no AI enrichment or synthesis.

deep_research.description: Full-depth search up to 5000 results, no AI processing.

deep_analyze.description: Full-depth search with per-record TLDR and citation enrichment.

deep_thinking.description: Full-depth search with enrichment plus token-by-token AI synthesis.

light_thinking.description: Quick search with a short streamed AI summary paragraph.

PICOInput.description: Structured PICO query components. At least one field must be non-empty when query_type is 'structured'.

SearchRequest.description: Request body for executing a search or streaming search.

query.description: Free-text, Boolean, PICO, or abstract query.

sources.description: Defaults to all 4 sources when null. Cannot be empty array.

max_results.description: Capped to 100 for quick and light_thinking modes.

validation_rules: When query_type='structured', pico is required with at least one non-empty component.
When query_type='abstract', query must be at least 50 characters.
sources cannot be an empty array (use null for all sources).
max_results is capped to 100 when search_mode is 'quick' or 'light_thinking'.

SearchResponse.description: Returned when a non-streaming search is started.

search_id.description: Opaque UUID identifying the search session.

SearchStatusResponse.description: Status of a running or completed search.

source.description: Primary source this record came from.

sources_found_in.description: All sources where this record appeared.

PaginatedResults.description: One page of cursor-paginated search results.

next_cursor.description: Pass as ?cursor= to get the next page. Null means last page.

EnrichmentResponse.description: Enrichment metadata for a single record.

PrismaCounts.description: PRISMA systematic review flow diagram counts.

identified.description: Total records found across all sources before dedup.

oa_retrieved.description: Records with open-access full text available.

ChatRequest.description: Send a natural-language message about search results. No record IDs needed — reference papers by name.

search_id.description: The search session whose results you're discussing.

message.description: Free-text message, e.g. 'Explain the Zhang 2024 paper' or 'Compare the first two results'.

conversation_id.description: Omit to start a new conversation. Provide to continue an existing one.

ResolvedRecord.description: Compact reference to a paper the system resolved from the user's message.

record_ids.description: IDs of papers referenced in this message.

system.description: API root — returns name, version, and status.
Health check — probes database and Redis connectivity.

search.description: Execute a search (non-streaming). Returns a search_id immediately; use /status and /results to poll.

errors.422: Validation error (bad query_type, empty sources, etc.).
errors.429: Rate limit exceeded. Check Retry-After header.
errors.502: One or more source APIs failed.

search.description: Preview how the query will be translated for each source database, without executing a search.
Execute a search with real-time SSE streaming. Events arrive as each source completes, records are enriched, and AI synthesizes results.

response.description: Server-Sent Events. See sse_events.search_stream for event types.

search.description: Check the status of a previously started search.
Retrieve one page of deduplicated search results with cursor pagination.

cursor.description: Pagination cursor from previous response's next_cursor.

enrichment.description: Get AI enrichment (TLDR summary, citation count, OA status, PDF link) for a single record.

prisma.description: Compute PRISMA systematic review flow counts for a completed search, with optional filters.

open_access_only.description: If true, only count open-access records.

errors.422: Invalid source name in sources parameter.

chat.description: Send a natural-language follow-up message about search results. Response streams token-by-token via SSE. Reference papers by name — no IDs required.

response.description: Server-Sent Events. See sse_events.chat_stream for event types.

example_messages: Explain the Zhang 2024 paper in simple terms
Deep dive into the RECOVERY trial's methodology
Compare the first paper with the WHO solidarity trial
What are the limitations across all these studies?
Find more research related to that hydroxychloroquine meta-analysis

chat.description: Retrieve full conversation history with all messages.

conversation_id.description: UUID from chat_started event or previous conversation.

chat.description: List all conversation threads for a search session.

response.description: Array of conversations, newest first. Empty array if none.

sse_events._wire_format:
Each SSE message has two lines: 'event: <type>
data: <json>

'. A keepalive comment ': keepalive

' is sent every 15 seconds of inactivity.

search_stream.description: Events emitted by POST /api/v1/search/stream. Events arrive in chronological order through the search lifecycle.
event_sequence: status (enriching with AI) — only deep_analyze / deep_thinking
record_enriched (one per record) — only deep_analyze / deep_thinking

search_started.description: First event. Confirms the search session was created.

status.description: Human-readable narration of what the system is doing. Show this in the UI like ChatGPT's 'Searching...' messages.

examples: Searching PubMed, OpenAlex, Europe PMC, ClinicalTrials.gov...
Enriching 150 articles with AI summaries and citations...

source_searching.description: Emitted when a source fetch begins.

count.description: Number of records found from this source.

source_failed.description: One source failed. Search continues with remaining sources.

record_enriched.description: One record was enriched with TLDR/citations. Only emitted in deep_analyze and deep_thinking modes.

thinking.description: One token of AI synthesis. Concatenate all chunks to build the full analysis. Only emitted in deep_thinking and light_thinking modes.

chunk.description: A fragment of the AI's response text.

error.description: Emitted if the search fails. May appear at any point.

chat_started.description: Conversation identified and paper references resolved.

conversation_id.description: UUID. Use this for follow-up messages.

resolved_records.description: Papers the system thinks the user is referring to. Highlight these in the UI.

thinking.description: One token of the AI's response. Concatenate all chunks.

message_id.description: UUID of the persisted assistant message.

format.description: All error responses follow this structure.

status_codes.404: Resource not found (search, record, or conversation).
status_codes.422: Validation error (malformed request body, invalid enum values, constraint violations).
status_codes.429: Rate limit exceeded. Check the Retry-After header for seconds to wait.
